channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Gauteng taxi industry and transport MEC clash over licensing and leadership disputes
item.description: The Gauteng taxi industry has warned of a potential protest march within seven days if unresolved grievances against transport MEC Kedibone Diale-Tlabela are not addressed. The Gauteng National Taxi A...

item.title: Grassroots Educare Trust empowers children through early childhood development
item.description: Grassroots Educare Trust, founded in 1972, has been dedicated to improving early childhood development (ECD) in vulnerable communities across South Africa for over five decades. Based in Plettenberg B...

item.title: Akeredolu's Legacy: Trust and Leadership in Nigerian Politics
item.description: The article commemorates the 70th birthday of Arakunrin Oluwarotimi Odunayo Akeredolu, former Ondo State Governor, highlighting his leadership style, trust in aides, and commitment to governance. Aker...

item.title: Texas Roadhouse celebrates 10 years in the Philippines and plans regional expansion
item.description: Texas Roadhouse, a popular American steakhouse chain, is celebrating its 10th anniversary in the Philippines. The restaurant has been operating in the country since 2016 and has become a staple in Man...

item.title: Millie Mackintosh reflects on moving out of her former marital home and embracing a new chapter
item.description: Millie Mackintosh has shared insights into her decision to move out of the marital home she once shared with her former partner, Hugo Taylor. Describing the transition as a 'healing' process, the cele...

item.title: Niger Delta Economic Renaissance: From Oil Dependence to Blue Economy Opportunities
item.description: In a detailed address, Timi outlined a comprehensive strategy to transform the Niger Delta from an oil-dependent region into a diversified economic hub. He emphasized the need for institutionalizing b...

item.title: Olivia Wilde Discusses Public Fallout of Her Split from Harry Styles and Controversies Surrounding 'Don't Worry Darling'
item.description: The article explores Olivia Wilde's reflections on the high-profile nature of her split from actor Harry Styles, which has been scrutinized in public spaces, and the controversies surrounding her film...

item.title: Quebec Premier Denies Unjustified Tariff Threat from Trump
item.description: The Quebec Premier has publicly dismissed President Trump's recent threat to impose 50% tariffs on Canadian goods as 'unjustified,' emphasizing the potential harm to bilateral trade relations. The sta...

item.title: Matatu Accident in Gatundu Leaves 18 Students Injured
item.description: An early-morning accident in Gakoe, Gatundu North, Kiambu County, left 18 students injured after a matatu overturned and crashed while ferrying them to school. The incident occurred on Monday, July 20...

item.title: Protests Continue Against Education Minister Amid Police Crackdown in Delhi
item.description: The Cockroach Janta Party (CJP) has alleged that Delhi police used pellet guns against peaceful protesters during demonstrations at Jantar Mantar. The Union government classifies pellet guns as non-le...

item.title: Weightlifter Ridge Barredo competes in Commonwealth Games after MAFS fame
item.description: Ridge Barredo, a competitive weightlifter known for his role on the reality TV show Married at First Sight, has arrived in Scotland to compete in the Commonwealth Games. The 2026 event marks a signifi...

item.title: Pakistan's Finance Minister Discusses Refinery Modernization with US Tech Firm
item.description: Finance Minister Senator Muhammad Aurangzeb met a delegation from Honeywell Technologies in Washington to discuss a proposed plan to modernize and expand Pakistan's refinery sector. The meeting, part ...

item.title: Understanding Client Needs is Key to Successful Pitches
item.description: The article highlights the common mistake of focusing on impressing clients during pitches rather than addressing their actual needs. The author shares a personal experience where over-preparation wit...

item.title: CBN opens accounts for disputed 'phantom' council amid legal scrutiny
item.description: The Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) confirmed it received authorization from the Office of the Accountant-General of the Federation (OAGF) to open two domiciliary accounts for the disputed Presidential ...

item.description: The eighth day of Vice President Sara Duterte's impeachment trial focuses on National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) Director Melvin Matibag's testimony, which serves as the final witness for the House...

item.title: Survivor Reflects on Trauma After Kidnap and Rape Attempt

item.title: Natalie Wood's Wardrobe and Makeup Evolution: Studio Tests from the 1950s and 1960s

item.title: Mavis Tire Acquires Pep Boys to Expand Automotive Services
item.description: Mavis Tire, a leading automotive service provider, has announced plans to acquire Pep Boys, a major player in the automotive industry, to expand its market presence. The merger aims to combine Mavis T...

item.title: Analyst Warns of Dire Consequences if Trump Escalates Iran Conflict
item.description: A New Republic analyst warns that President Donald Trump's potential actions in Iran could lead to catastrophic global consequences. The piece outlines four alarming scenarios, including the possibili...

item.title: iran and us escalate military clashes in gulf region amid heightened tensions
item.description: iran has intensified its attacks on us military installations in the gulf, warning washington of more severe strikes, as the us continues its military operations against iran. the conflict, now in its...
